name: Green Chilli Paste
intro: Whenever green chillies are called for in a recipe, you could use an equal amount of this paste. Any fresh green chillies will do. Generally speaking, the larger the chilli, the milder it is.

ingredients.item: I usually use green chillies like bird’s eye or bullet chillies

method: Simply blend the amount you require with just enough water to make a paste and use as required. The chilli paste can be frozen in ice cube trays just like garlic and ginger paste.
